questionHtml:
Which compounds are members of the same homologous series?

A.  propanal, propanone, propanoic acid

B.  propane, propene, propyne

C.  hexan-1-ol, hexan-2-ol, hexan-3-ol

D.  ethanol, propan-1-ol, butan-1-ol
